## Benchmark results (C#)

List of algorithms:  
- bs 		– Bisection  
- fp		– False-position  
- ill		– Illinois  	
- AB	– Anderson-Björck  
- ITP		– Interpolate, truncate, project  
- Rid	– Ridders  
- Brе	– Brent  
- modAB	– Modified Anderson-Björck 2026
